nasb.text: As Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, even so must the Son of Man be lifted up;

esv.text: And as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so must the Son of Man be lifted up,

cnv.text: 摩西在曠野怎樣把銅蛇舉起，人子也必照樣被舉起來，

ccb.text: 摩西在旷野怎样举起铜蛇，人子也必照样被举起来，

csbs.text: 摩西在旷野怎样把铜蛇举起，人子也必须照样被举起来，
